answers: Start vlogging: your smartphone camera is enough! Good lighting and audio matter more than camera quality.
Equipment: phone with good camera, ring light ($20), lavalier mic ($15), and a simple tripod. Total under $50.
Vlogging tips: be authentic, plan a rough outline, shoot in good lighting, and edit for pacing (cut boring parts).
Vlog banano: phone diye shoot koro, natural light e, mic use koro, CapCut e edit koro, ar YouTube e upload koro.
